_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Deno Generic
author: eggs@pashka.host
description: A generic Deno egg with native Git support. Clones or pulls a repo on every start and runs it with Deno. Supports TypeScript, JavaScript, JSX and TSX out of the box with configurable permissions.
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDRESS}"; if [[ "${GIT_ADDR}" != *.git ]]; then GIT_ADDR="${GIT_ADDR}.git"; fi; USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"; REPO_URL="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@${GIT_ADDR}"; BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"; if [ ! -d .git ] || [ ! -f .git/config ]; then echo "Cloning repo..."; rm -rf * .git && git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" .; else echo "Pulling latest from $BRANCH..."; git fetch origin "$BRANCH" && git reset --hard FETCH_HEAD; fi; fi; if [ ! -z "${PRE_START_CMD}" ]; then echo "Running pre-start command..."; eval "${PRE_START_CMD}"; fi; export DENO_DIR=/home/container/.deno; /home/container/deno cache /home/container/${MAIN_FILE} 2>/dev/null || true; /home/container/deno run ${DENO_PERMISSIONS} ${DENO_ARGS} /home/container/${MAIN_FILE} ${APP_ARGS}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Deno Generic — Installation Script
# Support: eggs@pashka.host

apt update -y
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

## Install Deno
echo "Installing Deno..."
GITHUB_PACKAGE=denoland/deno
MATCH=x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu

LATEST_JSON=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/${GITHUB_PACKAGE}/releases/latest")

if [ -z "${DENO_VERSION}" ] || [ "${DENO_VERSION}" == "latest" ]; then
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo ${LATEST_JSON} | jq -r '.assets[].browser_download_url' | grep ${MATCH} | grep -v sha256)
else
    RELEASES=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/${GITHUB_PACKAGE}/releases")
    VERSION_CHECK=$(echo ${RELEASES} | jq -r --arg V "v${DENO_VERSION}" '.[] | select(.tag_name==$V) | .tag_name')
    if [ ! -z "${VERSION_CHECK}" ]; then
        DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo ${RELEASES} | jq -r --arg V "v${DENO_VERSION}" '.[] | select(.tag_name==$V) | .assets[].browser_download_url' | grep ${MATCH} | grep -v sha256)
    else
        echo "Version ${DENO_VERSION} not found — falling back to latest."
        DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo ${LATEST_JSON} | jq -r '.assets[].browser_download_url' | grep ${MATCH} | grep -v sha256)
    fi
fi

echo "Downloading Deno from ${DOWNLOAD_URL}..."
curl -sSL "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" -o deno.zip
unzip -o deno.zip
rm -f deno.zip
chmod +x deno
echo "Deno $(/mnt/server/deno --version | head -1) installed."

## Clone repo
if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo "No git repo set — skipping clone."
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"

if [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "Using anonymous clone."
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server | grep -v deno)" ]; then
    if [ -d .git ] && [ -f .git/config ]; then
        ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
            echo "Pulling latest from ${BRANCH}..."
            git pull origin ${BRANCH}
        else
            echo "Different repo detected — skipping pull."
        fi
    else
        echo "Files found with no git config — skipping to avoid data loss."
        exit 10
    fi
else
    echo "Cloning ${GIT_ADDRESS} (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
    git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
fi

## Pre-cache dependencies
export DENO_DIR=/mnt/server/.deno
if [ -f /mnt/server/${MAIN_FILE} ]; then
    echo "Caching dependencies..."
    /mnt/server/deno cache /mnt/server/${MAIN_FILE} 2>/dev/null || true
fi

echo "Installation complete."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL of the Git repository to clone.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and pull from on each start.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pulls the latest changes from the repository on every startup.

variables.name: Main File
variables.description: Entry point to run. Supports .ts, .js, .tsx and .jsx.

variables.name: Deno Permissions
variables.description: Permission flags passed to deno run. Use --allow-all to grant all permissions.

variables.name: Deno Arguments
variables.description: Extra flags passed to deno run.

variables.name: App Arguments
variables.description: Arguments passed to the application at runtime.

variables.name: Deno Version
variables.description: Deno version to install. Leave empty or set to latest for the newest release.

variables.name: Pre-Start Command
variables.description: Shell command to run after pulling but before the app starts.
